name: Pan Roasted Vegetables w/ Warm Manchego Cheese
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Manchego cheese, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In an oven-proof container, arrange the vegetables in layers, alternating types.
2. Drizzle with olive oil, season with salt and pepper.
3. Bake at 350ºF for 20-30 minutes.
4. Sprinkle Manchego cheese over the top.
5. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve as a side dish with roasted or grilled meat.
